message:
feat(abi,core,bench): refactor elimination array, expand ABI test fixtures, and add elimination benchmarks

The elimination backoff in the lock-free malloc allocator is refactored
with a deterministic thread-tag allocator (replacing DefaultHasher),
explicit spin-limit constant, and a split offer/offer_with_base API that
returns exchange metadata for observability. The resolver and iconv ABI
test suites are substantially expanded.

- elimination.rs: replace DefaultHasher thread tagging with monotonic
  AtomicU64 allocator; add SPIN_LIMIT constant; split offer() into
  offer() + offer_with_base() returning EliminationExchangeMeta; add
  slot-level publish counter for contention tracking
- mod.rs: wire new elimination observability exports
- resolv_abi_test.rs: add fixture-based resolver backends with
  FRANKENLIBC_HOSTS_PATH/SERVICES_PATH env vars, per-test temp files,
  and serialized env mutation via RESOLVER_ENV_LOCK
- iconv_abi_test.rs: add tests for EILSEQ on invalid UTF-8 (preserves
  input/output pointers) and EINVAL on incomplete UTF-8 sequences
- build.rs: minor adjustment for new ABI surface
- Add elimination_bench.rs benchmark harness for slot contention and
  throughput measurement under varied thread counts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 name = "baseline_capture_bench"

+[[bench]]
+name = "elimination_bench"
+harness = false
